prompt: In this tournament preflop spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Fold protects your stack when tournament life is at risk.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the track cue set, so the line avoids paying off when the pressure story is working against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold here because tournament life is too expensive to defend this preflop spot loosely.
